temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man in a shiny, dark red leather jacket sits at a table in a dimly lit, greenish-hued restaurant. He looks down with a serious expression, fiddling with his chopsticks. He asks a question in Cantonese. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense conversation, establishing the main character and the serious tone of the discussion.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, questioning. 2) Background sounds: Faint restaurant ambiance.)
(00:04-00:07) The man in the leather jacket gestures with his chopsticks towards another man in a grey suit who is standing behind him. As he speaks, a bright, fiery explosion suddenly erupts from the back of the restaurant, engulfing the area in a blinding white and orange light. (Storyline: The scene takes a sudden, violent turn, shifting from a tense conversation to a moment of extreme danger and chaos, suggesting a flashback or a metaphorical event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds: A loud, booming explosion sound effect.)
